name: windmill-cli-docs
description: Auto-generated Windmill CLI docs: agent prompt, skills, and full CLI reference. Source: github.com/windmill-labs/windmill.

skills.name: write-script-ansible
skills.description: MUST use when writing Ansible playbooks.

skills.name: write-script-bash
skills.description: MUST use when writing Bash scripts.

skills.name: write-script-bigquery
skills.description: MUST use when writing BigQuery queries.

skills.name: write-script-bun
skills.description: MUST use when writing Bun/TypeScript scripts.

skills.name: write-script-bunnative
skills.description: MUST use when writing Bun Native scripts. The script must start with //native to run on the native worker.

skills.name: write-script-csharp
skills.description: MUST use when writing C# scripts.

skills.name: write-script-deno
skills.description: MUST use when writing Deno/TypeScript scripts.

skills.name: write-script-duckdb
skills.description: MUST use when writing DuckDB queries.

skills.description: MUST use when writing Go scripts.

skills.description: MUST use when writing GraphQL queries.

skills.name: write-script-java
skills.description: MUST use when writing Java scripts.

skills.name: write-script-mssql
skills.description: MUST use when writing MS SQL Server queries.

skills.name: write-script-mysql
skills.description: MUST use when writing MySQL queries.

skills.name: write-script-php
skills.description: MUST use when writing PHP scripts.

skills.name: write-script-postgresql
skills.description: MUST use when writing PostgreSQL queries.

skills.name: write-script-powershell
skills.description: MUST use when writing PowerShell scripts.

skills.name: write-script-python3
skills.description: MUST use when writing Python scripts.

skills.name: write-script-rlang
skills.description: MUST use when writing R scripts.

skills.name: write-script-rust
skills.description: MUST use when writing Rust scripts.

skills.name: write-script-snowflake
skills.description: MUST use when writing Snowflake queries.

skills.name: write-flow
skills.description: MUST use when creating flows.

skills.name: raw-app
skills.description: MUST use when creating raw apps.

skills.name: triggers
skills.description: MUST use when configuring triggers.

skills.name: schedules
skills.description: MUST use when configuring schedules.

skills.name: resources
skills.description: MUST use when managing resources.

skills.name: write-workflow-as-code
skills.description: MUST use when writing or modifying Windmill Workflow-as-Code scripts using workflow, task, step, sleep, approvals, taskScript, taskFlow, task_script, or task_flow.

skills.name: cli-commands
skills.description: MUST use when using the CLI, including debugging job failures and inspecting run history via `wmill job`.

skills.name: preview
skills.description: MUST use when opening the Windmill dev page / visual preview of a flow, script, or app. Triggers on words like preview, open, navigate to, visualize, see the flow/app/script, and after writing a flow/script/app for visual verification.
